message:
fix: Correct cache eviction counting in ConversationCache::insert

The eviction counter was incremented whenever a shard was at capacity,
but this was incorrect when updating an existing key - put() on an
existing key just updates the value without evicting. Now we only
count eviction when the shard is full AND the key doesn't already exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
